name: Raizhell
description: '''Nicolò Arquilla''' (born 23 April 1987), better known as '''Raizhell''' (pronounced "Raise Hell") and formerly known as '''Razihel''', is an [[Italians|Italian]] electronic music producer known for his releases on the Canadian-based record label [[Monstercat]]. Prior to his solo music career, Arquilla was the lead vocalist for the Italian [[post-hardcore]] band [[Hopes Die Last]]. Arquilla is also a member of the pop-punk duo Streex.
